games.title: Mario Kart 65
games.desc: Experience the thrill of racing with Mario and friends, in the classic karting game- Now in 3D! Nintendo Switch version available.

games.title: Dark Soles II
games.desc: A dark fantasy action-RPG about a cursed pair of "kicks" traveling to a ruined kingdom, in search of a special cure.
games.f1: Xbox, PS, Switch 2, and PC versions available
games.f3: Can run at up at 4K 60FPS or 1440p 120FPS on select systems.

games.title: Carl on Duty: Black Cops
games.desc: Be an officer. Be Carl. Save NYC from the hoodlums and criminals terrorizing the subways, in this new fast-paced justice shooter.

games.title: Call of Duty: Kitchen Patrol
games.desc: NATO's Soldiers won't feed themselves! Rush to the rescue and prepare delicious and fortifying meals for our men.
games.f3: Online Competitive Modes, with more coming soon!

games.title: Grand Theft Authors
games.desc: You're above the law. Commit piracy, theft, illegal distribution, and many other notorious crimes in the library-based open world shooter.
games.f2: Impressive graphics, runs on lower-end PCs smoothly.

games.title: Block Craft 3D
games.desc: Mine, Create, Craft and have fun in this simple sandbox game.
games.f3: Fun for All Ages! Rated E by ESRB.

games.title: Super Plumber Run!
games.desc: The Super Plumber returns to save Fungi Palace! Step on the evil reptiles, get fire powers, and save the Queen Mango in this action-packed 2D classic.
games.f1: Mobile exclusive, runs on Android 8+ or iOS 11+
games.f2: Web demo available, with PC Keyboard Support
games.f3: Remove Ads with a one-time purchase of 3$

games.title: Malevolent Citizen
games.desc: Fight the zombies created by the Raincover Corporation. Uncover the truth. Save Skunk City, and solve mysteries along the way, in this horror shooter.
games.f1: Play as the infamous Leon S. Kenton.
games.f2: Horror and fear await you at every corner.
games.f3: PlayStation exclusive, with an Xbox version coming in 2027.
